arts.ttl: AC Milan Target Alan Varela to Strengthen Midfield for the Summer
arts.sum: AC Milan are focusing on both their current performance and future prospects as they eye potential summer signings. One of the key targets for the upcoming transfer window is Alan Varela, a promising midfielder from Porto. Gianluca Di Marzio reports that the Argentine player has caught the attention of Milan’s management and head coach Sergio Conceição, who values his contributions on the field. Varela has had a notable season, participating in 16 league matches and five in the Europa League, showcasing his skills by scoring three goals and providing two assists across 43 games under Conceição.
